channel.title: sssd on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in sssd on IT notes

item.title: ldap_auth_disable_tls_never_use_in_production
item.description: To use sssd disabling TLS ( sssd doesn’t work without TLS but there is this undocumented option you can use ): ldap_auth_disable_tls_never_use_in_production = true In case you get this error: Attribute 'ldap_auth_disable_tls_never_use_in_production' is not allowed in section Try running this: authconfig --enablemkhomedir --enablesssdauth --updateall The enablemkhomedir is a plus If when running authconfig your /etc/sssd/sssd.conf gets overwritten, set to no this options: USELDAP=no USELDAPAUTH=no
